Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pl'S Deposition;
Off Calendar Apr-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant San Francisco Independent Taxi Association's motion to compel the deposition of plaintiff is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to immediately contact counsel for defendant to schedule the deposition at a mutually convenient time. The deposition shall be completed within 30 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $490 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Deft'S Form Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Sanctions; Memorandum Of P/A In Support Thereof; And Declaration Of Kimberley G. Glover

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant San Francisco Independent Taxi Association's motion to compel responses to fom interrogatories is taken off calendar, at the request of the moving party. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
